examples: But, this I know, HE GOETH ON BEFORE.
Howbeit this kind goeth not out but by prayer and fasting.
Man goeth forth unto his work and to his Labour until the evening.
He was the heartless Nazi commandant Amon Goeth in "Schindler's List, " a role that earned him an Oscar nomination for best-supporting actor.
If I thought she'd listen to me, I would have reminded her that our family's motto could be, 'Love goeth before the fall.
